visit_summary: Don't drive yet — ask the seller about completeness and working lights before committing.
alignment_summary: The listing mentions working lights and specific animals, but the photos do not confirm the lights are working and some animals listed are not clearly visible or present in the photos.

reasons.text: Interactive toy farm playset has a red barn with working lights.
It comes with several animal figures including a chicken, a pink mouse, a sheep, a purple horse, a green cow, and a pink rabbit.
The photos show the farm playset with some animal figures.
The lights on the barn are not shown to be working in the photos.
Not all animals mentioned in the text (e.g., pink mouse, green cow, pink rabbit) are clearly identifiable or present in the photos.

seller_questions: Is this the complete set? Are all the animals mentioned included?
Are the lights on the barn working?
Are there any damages or cleanliness issues I should be aware of before visiting?
seller_message_draft: Hi! Is this still available? Is this the complete set with all the animals mentioned? Are the lights on the barn working? Are there any damages or cleanliness issues I should be aware of before visiting?
limitations: Completeness of the set and all included accessories.
Whether the lights and any other electronic features are actually working.
The exact condition and any hidden damage not visible in the photos.
The overall cleanliness and any odors.
The history of use and any potential recalls.
research_recommended: Research before you go: Completeness of the set and all included accessories.

future_capability_note: We don't verify prices, recalls, or seller history yet — you'll need to check these yourself. A future version of this product will do that research for you.
